name: Saultech Technology Co., Ltd
summary: Saul Tech Technology Co., Ltd. develops, manufactures, and sells precision equipment. It offers IC products in various series, such as wafer to tray, wafer to wafer, wafer to tape, and multi-function sorter products; LED mapping sorters and mini LED die attachments; and LD bar attachments. The company is based in Hsinchu City, Taiwan.
